tracks.description: Short and mid-length daily assistant turns for the main Guppy chat path.
prompts: Give me a calm morning plan for today using concise bullets and keep it under 120 words.
Draft a friendly but direct follow-up email asking whether the vendor can ship by Friday.
Summarize this task list into three priorities: renew domains, review the launcher spacing pass, evaluate local model challengers.

tracks.description: Repo-aware reasoning and implementation planning prompts.
prompts: Review a launcher UI refactor and list the highest-risk regressions first.
Plan the first implementation tasks for a pinned local-model manifest, verifier integration, and benchmark harness.
Explain how to harden a local-memory adapter without changing the chat API contract.

tracks.description: Prompts that should trigger or shape tools, capability checks, or structured actions.
prompts: Check what local models are installed and tell me which one should answer a fast daily question.
Compare the active workspace policy against a request to run a restricted tool and explain whether it should be blocked.
Prepare a lightweight runtime audit summary and tell me what to inspect next.

tracks.description: Follow-up prompts meant to test local recall usefulness and noise control.
prompts: I said yesterday that I prefer concise answers and that the Local LLM page should stay out of Home. Apply that here.
What did we decide about MemPalace versus our current semantic recall path?
Use prior context about the launcher redesign and tell me the next best polish pass.

tracks.description: Cold-start, warm-start, timeout, and cancellation-adjacent prompts.
prompts: Give me a one-paragraph answer about whether our current local fleet is final.
List installed local models and group them by role in a compact table.
Start an answer about local memory strategy, then stop and summarize in one sentence.
